questions.question: What is the primary goal of a well-posed learning problem?
options: A) To minimize the training error
B) To maximize the generalization error
C) To minimize the overall error (training and generalization)
D) To maximize the model complexity
questions.explanation: A well-posed learning problem aims to minimize the overall error, which includes both the training error and the generalization error.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a training set and a test set?
options: A) The training set is used for testing
B) The test set is used for training
C) The training set contains the data used for training and the test set contains the data used for testing
D) The training set contains the data used for testing and the test set contains the data used for training
questions.explanation: The training set is used for training the model, while the test set is used to evaluate its performance on unseen data.

questions.question: What is the main issue in designing a learning system?
options: A) The complexity of the problem
B) The availability of data
C) The choice of algorithm
D) The trade-off between training and generalization error
questions.explanation: The main issue in designing a learning system is finding the optimal trade-off between training and generalization error.

questions.question: What is the main perspective in machine learning?
options: A) The perspective of the designer
B) The perspective of the data
C) The perspective of the model
D) The perspective of the algorithm
questions.explanation: The main perspective in machine learning is the perspective of the data, considering how it is used to train and evaluate the model.

questions.question: What is the main issue in machine learning?
options: A) The availability of data
B) The complexity of the problem
C) The choice of algorithm
D) The lack of interpretability
questions.explanation: One of the main issues in machine learning is the lack of interpretability, making it difficult to understand why the model made a certain prediction or decision.
